title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXXV. Proverbs.
content:
See a pin and pick it up,
        All the day you'll have good luck;
        See a pin and let it lay,
        Bad luck you'll have all the day!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. LXXXV. Proverbs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
